title: Fig. 13 in New Basal Interatheriidae (Typotheria, Notoungulata, Mammalia) from the Paleogene of Central Chile
author: Hitz, Ralph B.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 13. Upper cladogram is a consensus of all trees 71 steps or shorter. The labeled nodes are those that persist compared to the consensus tree of 70 steps and shorter (fig. 6). The lower cladogram is a consensus of trees 72 steps and shorter, with persisting nodes labeled.
steps_raw: Fig. 13. Upper cladogram is a consensus of all trees 71 steps or shorter. The labeled nodes are those that persist compared to the consensus tree of 70 steps and shorter (fig. 6). The lower cladogram is a consensus of trees 72 steps and shorter, with persisting nodes labeled.
